# Changelog for `a2096c1`
>
> Generated by GPT-4.1 from 80 commits between `a2096c1` and `origin/v0/thecybertechexpert-2792-234f9b5f`

Use the 👍 and 👎 buttons in the editor toolbar to provide feedback on this AI response. *Your feedback helps us improve our AI features.*

----

### Added

- Adds dynamic category management in the admin dashboard, including icon/image upload, create/edit/delete features, and integration into product upload ([#54](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/54), [#53](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/53))
- Adds dynamic stock credential management interface, allowing real-time credential input for each stock, with validation and live statistics ([#52](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/52), [#51](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/51), [#50](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/50))
- Adds comprehensive footer redesign with professional layout and expanded sections for legal, support, and contact information ([#70](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/70), [#65](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/65))
- Adds decorative background images to subheading sections, including layered social media and VPN tool logos for enhanced visual appeal ([#71](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/71), [#66](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/66), [#64](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/64), [#63](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/63), [#60](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/60), [#59](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/59), [#58](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/58), [#55](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/55))
- Adds "All Categories" button to product grid and converts product view to a list format

### Changed

- Changes admin link location to footer and removes the hero image for a cleaner layout ([#40](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/40), [#57](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/57), [#56](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/56))
- Changes background and heading styles across features and subheadings for improved consistency and visual hierarchy
- Changes homepage to default to the shop for better user navigation
- Changes log messages and logging functions for improved traceability ([#72](https://github.com/dondave042/v0-nettoolz/issues/72))

### Fixed

- Fixes background image alignment and sizing for seamless and balanced visual presentation
- Fixes hero section image font size for improved readability
